justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "Thursday next week" as June 11th and "following Monday, June 15th" accurately.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent offered to check other times on Thursday or another day next week when the initial preferred time was unavailable, and then expanded the search to the entire day when the user reiterated their preference for Thursday.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent had one minor redundancy by asking to check "other times on Thursday" after already checking a range of times on that day, but otherwise was efficient.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth and professional, with the agent effectively guiding the user through the booking process despite initial unavailability.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context well and expanded the search intelligently when the initial request was unavailable, only slightly faltering by re-offering to check "other times on Thursday" after already checking a range.
